query: Take the approved webhook retry story through implementation, regression tests, documentation, and a merge-ready branch.
Pick up the partially completed CSV import work at its saved feature checklist and finish the remaining green steps.
Implement the specified cache-control response option in the server and prove it with tests before integrating it.
Users sometimes see duplicate webhook deliveries. Reproduce the defect, identify the cause, and patch it.
Assess the proposed CSV import implementation plan and point out missing edge cases; do not change code.
We might add team invitations someday, but roles, expiry, and acceptance behavior are all undecided. Help define it.
